task: Advanced high-value task: Pbpk Parameter Plausibility Set Parameter Plausibility Challenge. Scenario: an expert team is preparing a launch or release decision and needs a calculation-backed recommendation for pbpk parameter plausibility set. Embedded packet: Records: R1 hepatic_clearance_Lh=40 fraction_unbound_pct=64 logP=3; R2 hepatic_clearance_Lh=49 fraction_unbound_pct=60 logP=6; R3 hepatic_clearance_Lh=35 fraction_unbound_pct=75 logP=2. Remediation options: O1 changes hepatic_clearance_Lh by -12% cost=77000; O2 changes fraction_unbound_pct by -18% cost=95000; O3 changes logP by -25% cost=55000; max_budget=120000. Rules and constraints: parameter>2x comparator or logP>5 with fu<5% needs sensitivity run; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: calculate all derived metrics, classify each record, and explain the smallest set of values that determines the recommendation. Deliver PBPK_QC_1.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
